Các keycode:

[SHIFT]: 80 01
[ALPHA]: 80 02
[←]: 40 04
[→]: 80 08
[↑]: 80 04
[↓]: 40 08
[MENU]: 80 10
[OTPN]: 40 01
[CALC]: 40 02
[TÍCH PHÂN]: 40 10
[X]: 40 02
[PHÂN SỐ]: 20 01
[√]: 20 02
[x²]: 20 04
[xˆ]: 20 08
[log]: 20 10
[IN]: 20 20
[(-)]: 10 01
[ĐỘ]: 10 02
[x^-1]: 10 04
[SIN]: 10 08
[COS]: 10 10
[TAN]: 10 20
[STO]: 08 01
[ENG]: 08 02
[(]: 08 04
[)]: 08 08
[S<=>D]: 08 10
[M+]: 08 20
[AC]: 04 10
[÷]: 02 10
[-]: 01 10
[x10]: 04 40
[=]: 01 40
[0]: 10 40
[1]: 01 01
[2]: 01 02
[3]: 01 04
[4]: 02 01
[5]: 02 02
[6]: 02 04
[7]: 04 01
[8]: 04 02
[9]: 04 04
[DEL]: 04 08
[×]: 02 08
[+]: 01 08
[.]: 08 40
[ANS]: 02 40

========================================================================================================================================

Invert:
Set D138 to 04

========================================================================================================================================

HOW TO USE LINE_DRAW

org 0xd730
  setlr
  setsfr
  buffer_clear
  render.ddd4
  pop xr0
  hex 00 00 00 00
  BL line_draw
  render.ddd4
loop:
  xr0 = hex 30 d6 84 d1
  BL strcpy
  er14 = 0xd62e
  sp = er14,pop er14

Note:
xr0 = start_x start_y, end_x end_y
BL line_draw
start x: từ bên trái thu gọn thanh (pixel ngang)
start y: từ bên trái thu gọn thanh (pixel dọc)
end x: từ bên phải thu gọn thanh (pixel ngang)
end y: từ bên phải thu gọn thanh (pixel dọc)

========================================================================================================================================

Inject 8 line:

org 0xe9e0
spell:
  xr0 = 0x0108, adr_of text1
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x0908, adr_of text2
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x1108, adr_of text3
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x1908, adr_of text4
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x2108, adr_of text5
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x2908, adr_of text6
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x3108, adr_of text7
  smallprint
  xr0 = 0x3908, adr_of text8
  smallprint
  render.ddd4
loop:
  xr0 = 0xd184d630
  BL strcpy
  er14 = 0xd62e
  sp = er14,pop er14
text1:
  str"1111111111111111111111111111111111"
  0x00
text2:
  str"2222222222222222222222222222222222"
  0x00
text3:
  str"3333333333333333333333333333333333"
  0x00
text4:
  str"4444444444444444444444444444444444"
  0x00
text5:
  str"5555555555555555555555555555555555"
  0x00
text6:
  str"6666666666666666666666666666666666"
  0x00
text7:
  str"7777777777777777777777777777777777"
  0x00
text8:
  str"8888888888888888888888888888888888"
  0x00

========================================================================================================================================

How to render_bitmap:

xr0 = <x pos>, <y pos>, <width x>, <vertical y> 
render_bitmap  # 48 98 30 30
er0 = <addr bitmap>
render.ddd4
....

========================================================================================================================================

Scroll liên tục:

key:
   	er8 = 0xf039
   	er2 = 0x0001
		[er8]+=er2,pop xr8
		0x30303030
		goto loop
# […]

========================================================================================================================================

Hex Trái Tim V.2 43x39
00 FE 00 0F E0 00 03 FF 80 3F F8 00 0F FF C0 7F FE 00 1F FF F1 FF FF 00 3F FF FB FF FF 80 3F FF FF FF FF 80 7F FF FF FF FF C0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 FF FF FF FF FF E0 7F FF FF FF FF C0 7F FF FF FF FF C0 3F FF FF FF FF 80 3F FF FF FF FF 80 1F FF FF FF FF 00 1F FF FF FF FF 00 0F FF FF FF FE 00 07 FF FF FF FC 00 03 FF FF FF F8 00 01 FF FF FF F0 00 00 FF FF FF E0 00 00 7F FF FF C0 00 00 3F FF FF 80 00 00 1F FF FF 00 00 00 0F FF FE 00 00 00 07 FF FC 00 00 00 01 FF F0 00 00 00 00 FF E0 00 00 00 00 3F 80 00 00 00 00 1F 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00

Binary:

0000 0011 1111 1111 1000 0000 0011 1111 1111 1000 000
0000 1111 1111 1111 1100 0000 0111 1111 1111 1110 000

1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 1111 111

========================================================================================================================================

How to make loop?

set_segment:
    setlr
    di,rt
    er0 = adr_of length
    er2 = 0x0001
    [er0]=er2,rt
loop:
    qr0 = pr_length, (địa chỉ backup), (địa chỉ main), (địa chỉ main - 2)
    hex 32 89
length:
    (length dư)
    hex 00 00
    sp = er6,pop er8

Sample code:

org 0xd730 
  setlr 
  setsfr 
  di,rt 
  buffer_clear 
cursor_noflash: 
  xr0 = hex 13 d1 01 00 
  [er0] = r2 
print_bitmap_player:
  xr0 = hex 01 01 08 08 
  render_bitmap
  er0 = adr_of player 
  render.ddd4
check_key:
  er0 = adr_of key 
  getkey 
  xr12 = adr_of [-10] table,adr_of [-10] table 
  setlr
  call 17ca6 
  pop er0 
key:
  0x0000
  call 09c20
  call 1c64a
  sp = er6, pop er8
key_up_func: 
  er0 = 0x0005
  delay 
  er2 = 0xff00
  er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_bitmap_player
  [er8]+=er2,pop xr8 
  0x30303030
  goto loop
key_down_func:
  er0 = 0x0005
  delay
  er2 = 0x0100
  er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_bitmap_player
  [er8]+=er2,pop xr8 
  0x30303030
  goto loop 
key_left_func:
  er0 = 0x0005
  delay
  er2 = 0xffff
  er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_bitmap_player
  [er8]+=er2,pop xr8 
  0x30303030
  goto loop 
key_right_func:
  er0 = 0x0005
  delay
  er2 = 0x0001
  er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_bitmap_player
  [er8]+=er2,pop xr8 
  0x30303030
  goto loop 
loop:
  setlr 
  di,rt 
  er0 = adr_of length
  er2 = 0x0001
  [er0]=er2,rt
  qr0 = pr_length, hex e0 e9, hex 30 d7, hex 2e d7 
  hex 32 89
length:
  adr_arith end - adr_arith length
  hex 00 00 00
  sp = er6,pop er8
table:
  0x0480
  adr_of [-2] key_up_func
  0x0840
  adr_of [-2] key_down_func
  0x0880
  adr_of [-2] key_right_func
  0x0440
  adr_of [-2] key_left_func
  0x0000
  adr_of [-2] loop 
player:
  hex 18 18 DB FF FF FF FF C3
end:

========================================================================================================================================

Logo Casio
xr0 = hex 20 0c 80 16
render_bitmap
xr0 = hex 6e 64 30 30
BL render.ddd4

========================================================================================================================================

Bấm 1 scroll bấm 2 tắt scroll

org 0xd730
	xr0 = 0x0001d0f5
	[er0]=r2
	xr0 = 0x0015f031
	[er0]=r2

cuonxuong:
	er2 = 0x0000  
	er8 = 0xf039
	call 09ca0
	0x30303030
	er0 = 0x0001
	delay

spell4lines:  
	xr0 = 0x010e,adr_of [+4784] text1
	call 23dcc
	er0 = 0x110e
	call 23dcc
	er0 = 0x210e
	call 23dcc
	er0 = 0x310e
	call 23dcc
	render.ddd4

setupkey:
	er0 = adr_of key

getkey:
	call 2f5ea
	xr12 = adr_of [-10] table, adr_of [-10] table
	setlr
	call 17CA6
	pop er0

key:
	0x0000
	call 09C20
	call 1C64A
	sp = er6, pop er8

1:
	xr0=0x0004d138
	[er0]=r2
	goto loop
   
2:
	xr0=0x0000d138
	[er0]=r2
	goto loop   

3_cuon_len:
	xr0 = adr_of [+4788] cuonxuong, 0x0000
	[er0] = r2
	xr0 = adr_of [+4789] cuonxuong, 0x0001
	[er0] = r2
	goto loop

4_cuon_xuong:
	xr0 = adr_of [+4788] cuonxuong, 0x00ff
	[er0] = r2
	xr0 = adr_of [+4789] cuonxuong, 0x00ff
	[er0] = r2
	goto loop

5_het_cuon:
	xr0 = adr_of [+4788] cuonxuong, 0x0000
	[er0]=r2
	xr0 = adr_of [+4789] cuonxuong, 0x0000
	[er0]=r2
	xr0 = 0x0000f039
	[er0]=r2
	goto loop

loop:
	xr0 = 0xd184d630
	BL strcpy
	er14 = 0xd62e
	sp = er14,pop er14

table:
	hex 01 01
	adr_of [-2] 1
	hex 01 02
	adr_of [-2] 2
	hex 01 04
	adr_of [-2] 3_cuon_len
	hex 02 01
	adr_of [-2] 4_cuon_xuong
	hex 02 02
	adr_of [-2] 5_het_cuon   
	hex 00 00
	adr_of [-2] loop

text1:
	hex 45 6D 01 74 68 F4 74 01 6D F4 45 74 01 6E F4 88 01 63 F4 6F F4 46 69 2C 20 41 6E 68 01 64 F4 65 69 01 6B 68 F4 46 01 6E 68 F4 37 6E 01 6C F4 34 79

	hex 56 F4 70 20 6B F4 3C 20 74 F4 67 20 6E 67 F4 70 79 20 F4 34 79 20 41 6E 68 01 6C F4 70 01 6B F4 7B 01 74 F4 6F F4 4D 6E 67 01 74 F4 6F 3C 33 00 00 00 00

========================================================================================================================================

Hex tranh Bác Hồ 48x59
00 00 7F E0 00 00 00 00 FF E8 00 00 00 01 FF CD 80 00 00 07 FD CF 40 00 00 0F F1 8E 30 00 00 1F 80 00 00 00 00 3F 80 00 04 00 00 7C 00 00 1A 00 00 F8 00 00 1F 00 01 F0 00 00 0C 00 01 E0 00 00 03 00 03 E0 00 00 03 80 03 E0 00 00 03 80 07 E0 00 00 03 E0 07 C0 00 00 03 E0 07 C0 00 00 01 E0 03 C0 00 00 01 C0 0F C0 00 00 01 C0 0F C0 00 00 01 E0 0F E0 00 00 01 E0 0F E1 80 00 71 E0 0F FF F0 03 F9 E0 07 FF F8 07 DC E0 07 F8 08 00 0C E0 03 F8 0C 08 00 E0 0F FC 06 09 C0 80 07 BF F7 1F EC D0 0F 9F DF 07 98 D0 0F 9C 02 00 00 D0 0F CC 00 00 00 10 0B C1 C0 00 00 90 09 C0 00 00 00 80 09 C0 00 00 01 C0 0F C0 00 00 01 C0 0B E0 00 00 01 C0 0C F0 30 04 03 80 04 F0 50 01 03 00 03 70 9F 91 07 20 01 60 17 F0 07 E0 00 70 00 00 01 C0 00 30 04 00 00 00 00 30 7D FC 00 00 00 3C 7F FE 02 00 00 3C FF FE 02 00 00 1D F8 03 02 00 00 1F FC 01 04 00 00 0F FE 60 0C 00 00 0F BF 61 1C 00 00 0F BE 00 1C 00 00 07 CC 00 06 00 00 07 F8 00 00 00 00 07 E0 0C 00 00 00 1F E0 1C 00 80 00 1F E0 3F C0 40 00 67 A0 7F 00 00 01 06 00 7C 00 04 0C 06 20 78 00 01 60 0E 60 F0 00 00 80 06 40 E0 01 00

Hex tranh Bác Giáp 37x60
00 00 0F 80 00 00 1B FF E0 00 00 FF FF F8 00 00 F8 7C FE 00 03 C0 00 3F 00 07 00 00 1F 80 06 00 00 06 40 04 00 00 01 00 90 00 00 00 E0 68 00 00 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 98 00 00 03 80 30 00 00 03 E0 78 00 00 03 E0 78 00 03 83 F0 F8 00 1F 83 E0 79 FC 38 01 C0 70 0E 30 01 C0 30 0E 1F C0 C0 30 FC 0C 00 90 10 84 07 00 10 30 30 00 00 10 10 00 00 00 40 10 00 00 00 00 10 00 02 00 00 00 1F FD 80 00 00 33 F0 F0 00 00 60 00 70 00 01 C0 08 C0 E0 00 E3 FF 80 80 04 07 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 F8 00 00 00 00 00 1F 80 00 C0 00 39 C0 00 70 00 79 80 00 38 7F F1 80 00 FF FF F1 00 00 DF FF F1 00 01 CF FF E2 00 03 61 FF 86 00 02 70 3F 8C 00 0E 3B FF 18 00 3A 1F FF 30 00 42 1F FE 60 40 16 0C FC C0 78 15 CE 78 80 F0 07 C6 01 20 D0 07 C2 00 31 F0 0F E3 04 39 F0 0F E1 08 7F E0 1F F9 81 FF E0 1E 7C 87 FF E0 04 7C FF FF F0 00 3E FF FF F0 00 0F FF FF E0 00 07 FF C1 80 00 01 FF 01 00 00 03 FC 00 00 00 03 E0 00 00

Hex tranh Hello Kitti Fuck 59x47

0011 1100 1010 0001 1000 1100 1100 0000 0100 1111 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0110 0000 0000 0000 0000 0010 0110 0001 0011 1001 1000 1100 1000

1000 0100 1100 0010 0111 1100 0000 0000 1001 1111 0000 0000 0100 0000 0000 1010 0000 0011 0000 0010 0010 0100 0011 1011 0000 0001 0000 0000
0000 0100 1100 0000 0011 1100 0000 0000 1011 1111 0000 0110 1100 0000 0000 1010 0000 0010 0000 0010 0010 0100 0010 1110 0000 0001 1000 0010
0100 1001 1110 0100 1110 0000 0000 0000 1010 1110 0000 0011 1110 0000 0000 1010 0000 1110 0000 0010 0010 0100 0010 0000 1100 1100 0100 0010
0110 1001 0011 1111 1100 0000 0000 0000 1011 1110 0001 1110 0110 0000 0000 0110 0001 1100 0000 0010 0010 0100 0010 0011 1001 0000 1000 0001
0111 0001 0000 1111 1000 0000 0000 0110 0111 1110 0001 1111 0001 0000 0000 0110 0011 1100 0000 0010 0000 0100 0110 1111 0000 1001 0000 0001
0111 0011 0011 0000 0000 0000 0000 1100 0111 0110 0001 1111 1101 1000 0000 1110 0011 1100 0000 0010 0100 0100 0111 0110 0011 1110 0000 0000

0100 0101 0000 0000 0000 0000 0100 0000 0001 1110 0000 1001 1111 1100 0000 1110 0111 1000 0000 0110 0000 0000 0101 0010 0000 0110 0000 0000
1100 0110 0000 0000 0000 0001 1000 1000 0010 1110 0000 1101 1111 1110 0000 1100 0111 0000 0000 0110 1110 0000 1000 1110 1110 1000 0000 0000
1001 1000 0000 0000 0000 0111 1000 1000 0110 1110 0000 0110 1111 1110 0000 1100 1111 0000 0000 0101 1011 0000 1011 1111 1000 1100 0000 0000

========================================================================================================================================

RGP
Trái: 0xffff
Phải: 0x0001
Lên:  0xfff0
Xuống: 0x0010

========================================================================================================================================

Random

org 0xd730
  setlr 
  setsfr 
  buffer_clear
print_object:
  xr0 = hex 50 00 30 08 
  render_bitmap
  er0 = adr_of [+4788] object
  render.ddd4
check_object:
  setlr
  er2 = adr_of [+4788] print_object
  er0 = [er2],r2 = 9,rt
  r0=0
  er2=hex 00 35
  er0 - er2_gt,r0 = 0 |r0 = 1,rt
  r1=0,rt
  er2 = adr_of table
  call 13B9A
  er14 = er0,pop xr0
  0x30303330
  sp = er14,pop er14
generate:
  xr0 = adr_of adr_calc, var_a
  calc_func
  er0 = var_a
  num_to_byte
  setlr
  r1=0,rt
  er2 = er0,er0+=er4,rt
  er0 = adr_of [+4788] print_object
  [er0]=er2,rt
object_down:
  er2 = hex 00 02
  er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_object
  [er8]+=er2,pop xr8 
  0x30303030
  er0 = 0x0200
  delay
loop:
  xr0 = 0xd184d630
  BL strcpy
  er6 = 0xd62e
  sp = er6,pop er8
table:
  adr_of [-2] generate
  adr_of [-2] object_down
adr_calc:
  adr_of calc
calc:
  hex 31 36 a6 38 87 30 2c 31 32 00
object:
 hex ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff

========================================================================================================================================

Code mẫu random

org 0xd730
screen:
  xr0 = 0x0015f031
  [er0] = r2
init:
  setlr
  setsfr
  buffer_clear
  waitshift
random:
  xr0 = adr_of adr_equation, adr_of result
  calc_func
  xr0 = adr_of result, adr_of text
  num_to_str
  er0 = 0x3030
  xr0 = 0x210e, adr_of text
  smallprint
  render.ddd4
loop:
  qr0 = 0xd630, 0xd184, 0x3030, 0xd62e
  BL strcpy
  sp = er6,pop er8
adr_equation:
  adr_of equation
equation:
  hex 87 33 36 2c 36 37 # RanInt#(36,67
result:
  hex 00 00 00 00
text:
  hex 00 00 00 00

Ví dụ random từ 0 đến 10

xr0 = adr_of addr_equation, adr_of result
calc_func
addr_equation:
  adr_of equation
equation:
  hex 87 30 2c 31 30 00 # RanInt#(1,10
result:
# pad khoảng 2-3 byte
  0x000000

========================================================================================================================================

Random bitmap (guide)
org 0xd730
  setlr
  setsfr
  buffer_clear
render_random:
  xr0 = hex 10 10 02 04
  render_bitmap
  pop er0
bitmap_render:
  adr_of bitmap1
  render.ddd4
random:
  waitshift
  xr0 = adr_of adr_random, var_a
  calc_func
  setlr
  er2 = var_a
  er0 = [er2],r2=9,rt
  er2 = adr_of bitmap_table
  er0+=er0,er2+=er0,er0=[er2]
  er2 = adr_of [+4784] bitmap_render
  [er2]=er0,r2=0,pop er4,rt
  0x3030
loop:
  xr0=0xd184d630
  BL strcpy
  er6=0xd62e
  sp=er6,pop er8
adr_random:
  adr_of random_calc
random_calc:
  hex 87 30 2c 33 00 00
bitmap_table:
  adr_of bitmap1
  adr_of bitmap2
  adr_of bitmap3
  adr_of bitmap4
bitmap1:
  0x00000000
bitmap2:
  0x40404040
bitmap3:
  0x80808080
bitmap4:
  0xc0c0c0c0

========================================================================================================================================

Ta có công thức tính check phạm vi vùng
VD: object bitmap là 8x8 bây giờ muốn cho nó chạy trong vùng 192x63 pixel thì; Ta cho min x và min y = 0
max x = 192 - 8 (cạnh của x) = 184 từ DEC đổi sang HEX = B8
max y = 63 - 8 (cạnh của y) = 55 từ DEC đổi sang HEX = 37

========================================================================================================================================

Check range

check_x:
# đặt er0 là value x của cái cần cmp 
r1 = 0, rt # gán 00 cho r1 để tránh ô nhiễm
# cmp ea bla bla
table_x:
# [max_x - độ rộng x của bitmap]
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2
# [min_x ]
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2
00 00
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2 , nếu ko bằng 2 cái trên

check_y:
# đặt er0 là value y của cái cần cmp 
r0 = 0, rt # gán 00 cho r0 để tránh ô nhiễm
# cmp ea bla bla
table_x:
# [max_y - độ rộng y của bitmap]
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2
# [min_y]
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2
00 00
địa chỉ nhảy vào -2 , nếu ko bằng 2 cái trên

Đối với các value x ở table sẽ có dạng: xx 00 vì đã gán cho r1 = 0 , mục đích là để cmp tránh lỗi
Đối với các value y ở table sẽ có dạng: 00 yy vì đã gán cho r0 = 00 , mục đích vẫn là tránh lỗi

========================================================================================================================================

Congratulations !
Check range

org 0xd730
home:
    setlr
    setsfr
    di,rt 
    buffer_clear
check_ball_range_x:
    setlr
    er2 = adr_of [+4788] print_ball
    er0 = [er2],r2 = 9,rt
    r1 = 0,rt
    ea = adr_of range_table_x
    cmp_ea
    er6 = [ea]
    sp = er6,pop er8
max_left:
    xr0 = adr_of [+4788] print_ball, 0x4040
    [er0]=r2
    xr0 = adr_of [+4] print_ball, 0x4040
    [er0]=r2
    goto print_ball
max_right:
    xr0 = adr_of [+4788] print_ball, 0x7979
    [er0]=r2
    xr0 = adr_of [+4] print_ball, 0x7979
    [er0]=r2
print_ball:
    xr0 = hex 40 37 08 08
    render_bitmap
    er0 = adr_of ball
render:
    render.ddd4
check_key:
    er0 = adr_of keycode
    getkey
    pop er0
keycode:
    0x3030
    ea = adr_of keytable
    cmp_ea
    er6 = [ea]
    setlr
    sp = er6,pop er8
go_left:
    er2 = 0xfffd
    er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_ball
    [er8]+=er2,pop xr8
    0x30303030
    goto loop
go_right:
    er2 = 0x0003
    er8 = adr_of [+4788] print_ball
    [er8]+=er2,pop xr8
    0x30303030
loop:
    er0 = 0x0200
    delay 
    xr0 = 0xd184d630
    BL strcpy
    er14 = 0xd62e
    sp = er14,pop er14
keytable:
    hex 40 04 # ←
    adr_of [-2] go_left
    hex 80 08 # →
    adr_of [-2] go_right
    hex 00 00
    adr_of [-2] loop
range_table_x:
    hex 3d 00
    adr_of [-2] max_left
    hex 7c 00
    adr_of [-2] max_right
    hex 00 00
    adr_of [-2] print_ball
ball:
    hex 3c 7e ff ff ff ff 7e 3c
end:

========================================================================================================================================

Score auto

org 0xd730
cursor:
    xr0 = 0x0001d0f5
    [er0] = r2
    xr0 = 0x0015f031
    [er0] = r2
print_text_score:
    xr0 = 0x010a, adr_of [+4784] text_score
    smallprint
    render.ddd4
setup_score:
    xr0 = adr_of address_score, 0xd32e
    call 17922
    xr0 = adr_of address_int, 0xd3a0
    call 17922
    xr0 = 0xd3a0, adr_of [+4790] text_score
    num_to_str
    er0 = 0x0000 
loop:
    xr0 = 0xd184d630
    BL strcpy
    er14 = 0xd62e
    sp = er14,pop er14
address_score:
    adr_of score
address_int:
    adr_of int 
int:
    hex 83 42 d0 00
score:
    hex 42 a6 30 2e 32 35 00 00 
text_score:
    str"Score:"
    0x00

========================================================================================================================================

Cách reset con trỏ về vị trí ban đầu

# Thường dùng trong draw:
reset_position:
    setlr
    xr0 = 0xD722, 0x0000
    [er0] = er2,rt
    xr0 = 0xD724, 0x0000
    [er0] = er2,rt
